title: [BUG] Unable to align images correctly if a custom column width is applied.
author: joshvarun
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Consider a scenario where the column widths have been increased. 

I am trying to add an image which starts from 50% of the column width. However the image still considers the old column width when it should actually consider the new width of the column

Lib version: 4.3.0 / 4.4.0

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

```javascript
worksheet.addImage(imageId2, {
  tl: { col: 1.5, row: 1 },
  br: { col: 3.5, row: 3 }
});
```

## The expected behaviour:
Image should start from 50% of the updated column width. 

Currently it takes the default column width and starts from 50% of default width.
